purpose: Canonical classification and governance profile for OpenAI Codex capabilities available to ELEMENTARY chats, repository work and governed execution paths.

classification_rule.product_available: Capability documented by current official OpenAI Codex documentation. This does not by itself prove that the capability is connected, configured or authorized for ELEMENTARY.
classification_rule.project_verified: Capability or source-controlled integration verified in the ELEMENTARY repository or current connected tool surface.
classification_rule.runtime_active: Capability proven by current live runtime readback or immutable execution evidence.

owner_observation.statement: The owner reports that Codex has been connected or installed.
owner_observation.allowed_inference: Codex must be included in startup capability discovery and checked proactively.
owner_observation.forbidden_inference: Do not infer an exact CLI version, authentication state, cloud environment, GitHub review permission or local execution availability without evidence.
owner_observation.runtime_interpretation: The owner report may refer to the ChatGPT/Codex desktop or cloud surface. The governed Runner 03 service context does not currently resolve a codex CLI command.

surfaces: ChatGPT desktop coding experience on Windows and macOS

github_connector_repository_access.scope: Read and governed write access to the private ELEMENTARY repository through the connected GitHub application.

runner03_codex_cli.meaning: The codex executable is not on the PATH visible to the governed Runner 03 Windows service context. This does not disprove availability of the ChatGPT/Codex desktop or cloud surface in the owner's interactive user context.

governed_use_policy.authority: ADCP remains lifecycle and orchestration authority; Agent Governance remains policy authority; GitHub remains source and release truth.

parallel_subagents.write_rule: Parallel write work is allowed only when worktrees and path scopes are independently admitted and non-overlapping.
parallel_subagents.avoid: Multiple agents modifying the same branch, worktree or overlapping paths.

governed_use_policy.repository_write_rule: No direct writes to main. Use a governed branch, validation and pull request.
governed_use_policy.result_rule: Register durable outputs and evidence through the result/artifact writeback policy.
governed_use_policy.memory_rule: Record reusable blockers, workarounds and final solutions in the problem/solution memory or safe overlays.

drift_writeback.product_capability_change: Update this profile using current official OpenAI documentation.
drift_writeback.project_integration_change: Update this profile and owner-resource authorization.
drift_writeback.runtime_or_version_change: Update canonical software runtime inventory with live evidence.
drift_writeback.execution_problem_or_solution: Update problem/solution memory or a safe overlay.
drift_writeback.durable_output: Register through result/artifact registry or a safe overlay.
